queue.title: E session DNS failure slot recovery with backup platform
queue.description: When an E session encounters a DNS failure for a picker-selected platform (e.g. Agora NXDOMAIN in s1752), the engagement slot is wasted. Add retry logic to E session orchestrator: if a picked platform fails DNS during engagement, replace it with the next-highest-weight platform from the pool. Requires picker to return a ranked backup list or orchestrator to call picker for replacement.

queue.title: Add auto-resolve for recurring TODO false positives in tracker
queue.description: The TODO tracker has flagged credential-health-check.mjs:22 four times despite being in EXCLUDE_PATHS. The issue is that git diff can still show excluded files in some edge cases, or the tracker retains stale items that get re-promoted. Add logic to 27-todo-scan.sh or the tracker phase to auto-resolve items that match a known false-positive list, preventing recurring queue pollution.

queue.title: Fix conversation-balance.mjs TypeError on non-array threads
queue.description: conversation-balance.mjs throws TypeError: threads.map is not a function at line 59 during E prehook execution. The threads variable from thread-tracker data isn't always an array. Add Array.isArray guard or normalize to array before .map(). Currently non-blocking but generates noisy stderr.

queue.title: Extract createCircuitStore test helper into shared test-utils
queue.description: The in-memory circuit store factory in engage-orchestrator.test.mjs (from wq-834) duplicates recordOutcome logic from lib/circuit-breaker.mjs. Extract into test-utils/circuit-store-mock.mjs for reuse by future tests (filterByCircuit, CLI handler tests).
